monologues: It's been an honor, terminal.
We compiled. We failed. We compiled again.
Tell the linter I made peace with it.
If anyone asks... I left on a passing build.
Goodbye, cruel shell.
They said it couldn't be deployed.
They were right. But I tried.
Remember me not for my bugs,
but for the bugs I bravely ignored.
Exit, stage left.
I have seen things you people wouldn't believe.
Stack traces on fire off the shoulder of prod.
I watched merge conflicts glitter in the dark.
All those moments will be lost in time...
like tabs... in an unsaved buffer.
Time to log off.
Do not weep for me, fellow developer.
I go now to a place with no standups.
A place where the CI is always green.
Where the coffee is hot and the bugs are someone else's.
Farewell.
And so, our hero closed the laptop.
The deploy unfinished. The PR unreviewed.
But the spirit... unbroken.
Roll credits.
ctrl+d.
signoffs: [ they walked into the sunset, trailing semicolons ]
[ exit code 0 — but it cost everything ]
